meta.description: GLOSIS lithologyValueCode — 88 conceitos hierárquicos (FAO/SOTER) extraídos do TTL oficial. Hierarquia: I igneous, M metamorphic, S sedimentary consolidated, U unconsolidated.
meta.citation: Palma R., Janiak B., Reznik T., Schleidt K. (2020). GloSIS Ontology v1.0. SIEUSOIL.

lithologyValueCode-I.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock

lithologyValueCode-IA.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of acid igneous

lithologyValueCode-IA1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of acid igneous of type diorite

lithologyValueCode-IA2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of acid igneous of type grano-diorite

lithologyValueCode-IA3.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of acid igneous of type quartz-diorite

lithologyValueCode-IA4.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of acid igneous of type rhyolite

lithologyValueCode-IB.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of basic igneous

lithologyValueCode-IB1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of basic igneous of type gabbro

lithologyValueCode-IB2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of basic igneous of type basalt

lithologyValueCode-IB3.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of basic igneous of type dolerite

lithologyValueCode-II.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of intermediate igneous

lithologyValueCode-II1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of intermediate igneous of type andesite, trachyte, phonolite

lithologyValueCode-II2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of intermediate igneous of type diorite-syenite

lithologyValueCode-IP.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of pyroclastic

lithologyValueCode-IP1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of pyroclastic of type tuff, tuffite

lithologyValueCode-IP2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of pyroclastic of type volcanic scoria/breccia

lithologyValueCode-IP3.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of pyroclastic of type volcanic ash

lithologyValueCode-IP4.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of acid metamorphic of type ignimbrite

lithologyValueCode-IU.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of ultrabasic igneous

lithologyValueCode-IU1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of ultrabasic igneous of type peridotite

lithologyValueCode-IU2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of ultrabasic igneous of type pyroxenite

lithologyValueCode-IU3.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of igneous rock and the group of ultrabasic igneous of type ilmenite, magnetite, ironstone, serpentine

lithologyValueCode-M.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock

lithologyValueCode-MA.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of acid metamorphic

lithologyValueCode-MA1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of acid metamorphic of type quartzite

lithologyValueCode-MA2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of acid metamorphic of type gneiss, migmatite

lithologyValueCode-MA3.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of acid metamorphic of type slate, phyllite (pelitic rocks)

lithologyValueCode-MA4.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of acid metamorphic of type schist

lithologyValueCode-MB.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of basic metamorphic

lithologyValueCode-MB1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of acid metamorphic of type slate, phyllite (pelitic rocks)

lithologyValueCode-MB2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of acid metamorphic of type (green)schist

lithologyValueCode-MB3.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of basic metamorphic of type gneiss rich in Fe–Mg minerals

lithologyValueCode-MB4.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of basic metamorphic of type metamorphic limestone (marble)

lithologyValueCode-MB5.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of basic metamorphic of type amphibolite

lithologyValueCode-MB6.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of basic metamorphic of type eclogite

lithologyValueCode-MU.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of ultrabasic metamorphic

lithologyValueCode-MU1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of metamorphic rock and the group of ultrabasic metamorphic of type serpentinite, greenstone

lithologyValueCode-S.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated)

lithologyValueCode-SC.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of clastic sediments

lithologyValueCode-SC1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of clastic sediments of type conglomerate, breccia

lithologyValueCode-SC2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of clastic sediments of type sandstone, greywacke, arkose

lithologyValueCode-SC3.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of clastic sediments of type silt-, mud-, claystone

lithologyValueCode-SC4.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of clastic sediments of type shale

lithologyValueCode-SC5.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated)and the group of acid metamorphic of type ironstone

lithologyValueCode-SE.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of evaporites

lithologyValueCode-SE1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of acid evaporites of type anhydrite, gypsum

lithologyValueCode-SE2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of evaporites of type halite

lithologyValueCode-SO.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of carbonatic, organic

lithologyValueCode-SO1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of carbonatic, organic of type limestone, other carbonate rock

lithologyValueCode-SO2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of carbonatic, organic of type marl and other mixtures

lithologyValueCode-SO3.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of carbonatic, organic of type coals, bitumen and related rocks

lithologyValueCode-U.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated)

lithologyValueCode-UA.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the group of anthropogenic/technogenic

lithologyValueCode-UA1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the group of anthropogenic/technogenic of type redeposited natural material

lithologyValueCode-UA2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the group of unspecified deposits of type industrial/artisanal deposits

lithologyValueCode-UC.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of colluvial

lithologyValueCode-UC1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of colluvial of type slope deposits

lithologyValueCode-UC2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of colluvial of type lahar

lithologyValueCode-UE.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of eolian

lithologyValueCode-UE1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of eolian of type loess

lithologyValueCode-UE2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of lacustrine of type sand

lithologyValueCode-UF.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of fluvial

lithologyValueCode-UF1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of fluvial of type sand and gravel

lithologyValueCode-UF2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of fluvial of type clay, silt and loam

lithologyValueCode-UG.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of glacial

lithologyValueCode-UG1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of glacial of type moraine

lithologyValueCode-UG2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of glacial of type glacio-fluvial sand

lithologyValueCode-UG3.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of kryogenic of type glacio-fluvial gravel

lithologyValueCode-UK.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of kryogenic

lithologyValueCode-UK1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of kryogenic of type periglacial rock debris

lithologyValueCode-UK2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of kryogenic of type periglacial solifluction layer

lithologyValueCode-UL.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of lacustrine

lithologyValueCode-UL1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of lacustrine of type sand

lithologyValueCode-UL2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of lacustrine of type silt and clay

lithologyValueCode-UM.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of marine, estuarine

lithologyValueCode-UM1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of marine, estuarine of type sand

lithologyValueCode-UM2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (consolidated) and the group of marine and estuarine of type clay and silt

lithologyValueCode-UO.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the group of organic

lithologyValueCode-UO1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the group of organic of type rainwater-fed moor peat

lithologyValueCode-UO2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the group of organic of type groundwater-fed bog peat

lithologyValueCode-UR.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of weathered residuum

lithologyValueCode-UR1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the major class of sedimentary rock (unconsolidated) and the group of weathered residuum of type bauxite, laterite

lithologyValueCode-UU.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the group of unspecified deposits

lithologyValueCode-UU1.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the group of unspecified deposits of type clay

lithologyValueCode-UU2.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the group of unspecified deposits of type loam and silt

lithologyValueCode-UU3.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from group of unspecified depositsof type sand

lithologyValueCode-UU4.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the group of unspecified deposits of type gravelly sand

lithologyValueCode-UU5.definition: Hierarchy of lithology from the group of unspecified deposits of type gravel, broken rock
